near_term.headline: FY27 Margin Guided Range-Bound
near_term.claim: Management guided operating EBITDA margin to stay range-bound at 15-18% in FY27, broadly in line with FY26's 15.8%, with a possible 3-4 percentage-point uplift once HFC-32 revenue begins in Q4 FY27.
near_term.quote: we expect operating EBITDA margins to remain range-bound around 15% to 18% from existing line of business.

near_term.headline: ~Rs400cr Capex Funding Plan Largely Executed
near_term.claim: Of the ~Rs400 crore funding plan flagged on the call (Rs100 crore promoter preferential allotment + Rs300 crore QIP/term debt), the Rs250 crore QIP was allotted within seven weeks of guidance, and a Rs99.41 crore preferential issue awaits shareholder approval.
near_term.quote: we are planning to raise around INR400 crores, out of which INR100 crores will be from the promoters by way of the preferential allotment and remaining INR300 crores by way of QIP and term debt.

near_term.headline: New 30,000 TPA AHF Capacity to Be Announced
near_term.claim: A further captive Anhydrous HF expansion, to feed HF requirements for the HFC-32 plant, was flagged for formal announcement within two to three months of the call.
near_term.quote: we are going to announce it in next few months, that 30,000 tons of capacity.

medium_term.headline: HFC-32 Plant On Schedule for Q3 FY27
medium_term.claim: The Rs495 crore, 20,000 MTPA HFC-32 downstream fluorinated-products plant is progressing on timeline, with 65% of its capacity already contracted and management targeting 80-85% pre-sold before start-up.
medium_term.quote: The project is progressing well and remains on track for the commissioning by Q3 in the year FY27.

medium_term.headline: New HF Line and Second Solar DHF Plant Targeted ~Mid-2027
medium_term.claim: A new HF unit and a second 20,000 MTPA Solar Grade DHF line (doubling Solar DHF capacity to 40,000 MTPA) are targeted to come online together roughly 11-12 months from the call.
medium_term.quote: Within 11 to 12 months, the HF and new solar grade plant will come together. So we can consider June '27.

medium_term.headline: Rs3,612cr of Long-Term Supply Contracts Move Toward Execution
medium_term.claim: Three multi-year fluorinated-product/refrigerant-gas supply contracts - with an unnamed Japanese customer, an unnamed global multinational, and Blue Star - aggregating approximately Rs3,612 crore over 5-7 years begin converting to revenue as the HFC-32 plant ramps.
medium_term.quote: These include contracts aggregating to approximately INR3,612 crores over a period of 5 to 7 years, along with an additional agreement with Blue Star for an indefinite duration.

long_term.headline: FY28 Revenue Guided to Rs1,600-2,000cr
long_term.claim: Roughly 2.3-2.8x FY26 revenue, once the new HF and HFC-32 lines are both operational.
long_term.quote: FY28 I think we should be close to around INR2,000 crores, INR1,600 to INR2,000 crores because the new HF plant would also be operational at that time.

long_term.headline: Five-Year Ambition of Rs3,000-3,500cr Revenue
long_term.claim: Backed by a further Rs500-700 crore of capex over the next three to five years, deployed one project at a time into fluoropolymers, battery chemicals and electronic-grade chemicals.
long_term.quote: Our aim is to get to almost INR3,000 to INR3,500 crores in next five years.

long_term.headline: Solar Grade DHF Contracts Lock In ~85% Annual Utilization Through FY29
long_term.claim: Rs1,068 crore of orders already secured against the existing 20,000 MTPA Solar DHF capacity (both phases commissioned June and October 2025).
long_term.quote: We have secured orders for Rs 1,068 crores, to be executed over the next 3.5 years.
